_note: ALLOWLIST of items CONFIRMED vendor-stocked in-game. BuyPrice alone is NOT proof of vendor stock (73% of all items carry an intrinsic ~4-5x SellPrice BuyPrice, including world-drop cloth, gathered herbs, mined ore and smelted bars), so each entry is human-curated and must be in-game verified. The per-unit price is computed at BUILD time from DB2 BuyPrice / VendorStackCount (never hardcoded here) so it stays patch-current. 'verified:false' means curated-but-not-yet-in-game-confirmed; flipping to true is a release gate. 'flavors' restricts an entry to specific client flavors (omitted = all); Simple Flour (30817) is DEFAULT-only because it is absent from the Era/SoD DB2 build and unused by SoD recipes.
